mapper.sql: r.roleId, r.avatar, r.roleName, r.roleDesc, r.voiceName, r.ttsPitch, r.ttsSpeed, r.state, r.ttsId, r.modelId, model_config.configName AS modelName, r.sttId, r.temperature, r.topP, r.vadEnergyTh, r.vadSpeechTh, r.vadSilenceTh, r.vadSilenceMs, model_config.provider AS modelProvider, tts_config.provider AS ttsProvider, r.isDefault, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_device d WHERE d.roleId = r.roleId ) AS totalDevice, r.memoryType, r.createTime, r.updateTime
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_role r LEFT JOIN sys_config tts_config ON r.ttsId = tts_config.configId AND tts_config.configType = 'tts' LEFT JOIN sys_config model_config ON r.modelId = model_config.configId AND model_config.configType = 'llm' WHERE 1 = 1
AND r.userId = #{userId}
AND r.roleId = #{roleId} LIMIT 1
